lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

answers: A story that teaches a lesson

questions.text: What two questions did the law expert ask Jesus?
answers: How can I receive eternal life? Who is my neighbor?
What's the meaning of life? What is God's favorite color?
How can I be rich? Can you show me a miracle??
When will the kingdom come? Who is in charge?

questions.text: What happened to the traveler in Jesus’ parable?
answers: He was beaten and left for dead
He got lost in the desert

questions.text: What did the priest and Levite do for the traveler?
answers: They passed by and did not help
He cared for the man, took him to an inn, and paid for his care
He passed by on the other side

questions.text: How did Israelites usually feel about Samaritans?
answers: They hated them and avoided them

questions.text: Which person in the parable truly loved his neighbor?
What did Jesus say to the law expert after telling the parable?
answers: Go and do the same as the Samaritan did

questions.text: According to Jesus, who is our neighbor?
How did Jesus show his love for us?
answers: He died for our sins to save us
He took us to an inn
